mapper.select: SELECT id, request_type, status, project_id, space_id, iteration_id, work_item_id, workflow_instance_id, workflow_node_instance_id, agent_session_id, runtime_type, runtime_session_id, runtime_event_id, skill_name, mcp_server, mcp_tool, title, content, context_summary, options_json, priority, required_role, assignee_user_id, created_at, updated_at, resolved_by, resolved_at, resolution_comment, resolution_payload_json, interaction_id, interaction_type, interaction_schema_json, interaction_context_json, interaction_required, interaction_order_no FROM confirmation_request WHERE status = #{status} ORDER BY created_at DESC

SELECT id, request_type, status, project_id, space_id, iteration_id, work_item_id, workflow_instance_id, workflow_node_instance_id, agent_session_id, runtime_type, runtime_session_id, runtime_event_id, skill_name, mcp_server, mcp_tool, title, content, context_summary, options_json, priority, required_role, assignee_user_id, created_at, updated_at, resolved_by, resolved_at, resolution_comment, resolution_payload_json, interaction_id, interaction_type, interaction_schema_json, interaction_context_json, interaction_required, interaction_order_no FROM confirmation_request WHERE id = #{id}

SELECT id, request_type, status, project_id, space_id, iteration_id, work_item_id, workflow_instance_id, workflow_node_instance_id, agent_session_id, runtime_type, runtime_session_id, runtime_event_id, skill_name, mcp_server, mcp_tool, title, content, context_summary, options_json, priority, required_role, assignee_user_id, created_at, updated_at, resolved_by, resolved_at, resolution_comment, resolution_payload_json, interaction_id, interaction_type, interaction_schema_json, interaction_context_json, interaction_required, interaction_order_no FROM confirmation_request WHERE work_item_id = #{workItemId} ORDER BY created_at DESC

SELECT id, request_type, status, project_id, space_id, iteration_id, work_item_id, workflow_instance_id, workflow_node_instance_id, agent_session_id, runtime_type, runtime_session_id, runtime_event_id, skill_name, mcp_server, mcp_tool, title, content, context_summary, options_json, priority, required_role, assignee_user_id, created_at, updated_at, resolved_by, resolved_at, resolution_comment, resolution_payload_json, interaction_id, interaction_type, interaction_schema_json, interaction_context_json, interaction_required, interaction_order_no FROM confirmation_request WHERE agent_session_id = #{agentSessionId} AND request_type = 'PERMISSION' ORDER BY updated_at DESC, created_at DESC LIMIT 100

SELECT id, request_type, status, project_id, space_id, iteration_id, work_item_id, workflow_instance_id, workflow_node_instance_id, agent_session_id, runtime_type, runtime_session_id, runtime_event_id, skill_name, mcp_server, mcp_tool, title, content, context_summary, options_json, priority, required_role, assignee_user_id, created_at, updated_at, resolved_by, resolved_at, resolution_comment, resolution_payload_json, interaction_id, interaction_type, interaction_schema_json, interaction_context_json, interaction_required, interaction_order_no FROM confirmation_request WHERE agent_session_id = #{agentSessionId} AND request_type = 'EXCEPTION' AND status = 'PENDING' AND interaction_type = 'RUNTIME_EXCEPTION' ORDER BY updated_at DESC, created_at DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO confirmation_request (id, request_type, status, project_id, space_id, iteration_id, work_item_id, workflow_instance_id, workflow_node_instance_id, agent_session_id, runtime_type, runtime_session_id, runtime_event_id, skill_name, mcp_server, mcp_tool, title, content, context_summary, options_json, priority, required_role, assignee_user_id, resolved_by, resolved_at, resolution_comment, resolution_payload_json, interaction_id, interaction_type, interaction_schema_json, interaction_context_json, interaction_required, interaction_order_no) VALUES (#{id}, #{requestType}, #{status}, #{projectId}, #{spaceId}, #{iterationId}, #{workItemId}, #{workflowInstanceId}, #{workflowNodeInstanceId}, #{agentSessionId}, #{runtimeType}, #{runtimeSessionId}, #{runtimeEventId}, #{skillName}, #{mcpServer}, #{mcpTool}, #{title}, #{content}, #{contextSummary}, #{optionsJson}, #{priority}, #{requiredRole}, #{assigneeUserId}, #{resolvedBy}, #{resolvedAt}, #{resolutionComment}, #{resolutionPayloadJson}, #{interactionId}, #{interactionType}, #{interactionSchemaJson}, #{interactionContextJson}, #{interactionRequired}, #{interactionOrderNo})
mapper.update: UPDATE confirmation_request SET status = #{status}, resolved_by = #{resolvedBy}, resolved_at = #{resolvedAt}, resolution_comment = #{resolutionComment}, resolution_payload_json = #{resolutionPayloadJson}, interaction_id = COALESCE(#{interactionId}, interaction_id), interaction_type = COALESCE(#{interactionType}, interaction_type), interaction_schema_json = COALESCE(#{interactionSchemaJson}, interaction_schema_json), interaction_context_json = COALESCE(#{interactionContextJson}, interaction_context_json), interaction_required = COALESCE(#{interactionRequired}, interaction_required), interaction_order_no = COALESCE(#{interactionOrderNo}, interaction_order_no), updated_at = datetime('now') WHERE id = #{id}

UPDATE confirmation_request SET work_item_id = #{workItemId}, workflow_instance_id = #{workflowInstanceId}, workflow_node_instance_id = #{workflowNodeInstanceId}, agent_session_id = #{agentSessionId}, runtime_type = #{runtimeType}, runtime_session_id = #{runtimeSessionId}, title = #{title}, content = #{content}, context_summary = #{contextSummary}, options_json = #{optionsJson}, priority = #{priority}, interaction_type = #{interactionType}, interaction_context_json = #{interactionContextJson}, interaction_required = #{interactionRequired}, updated_at = datetime('now') WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 'PENDING'
